errors.network: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We could not find what you were looking for.
errors.conflict: This was changed elsewhere. We refreshed the latest version — please review and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.linkInvalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

practices.checkInWindowClosed: Check-in is closed for this session.
practices.attendanceRuleMissing: Attendance scoring is not configured yet.

states.emptyMessage: There is no content to show right now.
states.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
states.permissionMessage: Grant the required permission to use this feature.

pwa.updateBlocked: The update is waiting until your pending work is safely preserved.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ultimate Natives
welcome.subtitle: Manage practices, attendance, and player performance for your team.

auth.validationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotPasswordIntro: Enter your account email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccessMessage: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a link to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordIntro: Create a strong password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.
auth.linkInvalidMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.validationPasswordWeak: Use at least 12 characters with upper- and lower-case letters and a number.
auth.acceptInvitationIntroWithInviter: {{inviter}} invited you to join Ultimate Natives as {{role}}. Set a password to activate your account.
auth.acceptInvitationIntroFromTeam: The Ultimate Natives team invited you to join as {{role}}. Set a password to activate your account.
auth.invitationInvalidMessage: This invitation is invalid, has expired, or was already used. Ask an administrator to send a new one.
auth.acceptInvitationIntroTeamRole: You've been invited to join {{team}} as {{role}}. Set a password to activate your account.
auth.acceptInvitationIntroTeamRoleWithInviter: {{inviter}} invited you to join {{team}} as {{role}}. Set a password to activate your account.
auth.acceptInvitationDisplayNamePlaceholder: How your team will see you (optional)

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: These devices are currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeFailedToast: We could not sign out that device. Please try again.
sessions.emptyMessage: You are only signed in on this device.

home.title: Home
home.noAccessMessage: Your account is not linked to a team yet, or no team role has been granted to you. Ask a team administrator to add you — your navigation fills in as soon as access is granted.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.emptyMessage: Your dashboard has no cards for your role yet.
dashboard.offlineNotice: You are offline. Showing your last saved dashboard.
dashboard.widgetUnavailableMessage: This section did not load. Try again to fetch it.
dashboard.widgetPartial: Some of this section is still loading.
dashboard.taskConfirmPractice: Confirm attendance for the next practice
dashboard.taskFinalizeAttendance: Finalize attendance for the last session

attendance.title: Coach attendance
attendance.subtitle: Fast, conflict-safe check-in for the whole roster
attendance.finalizeMessage: This locks normal edits. Future changes require a correction reason and remain in audit history.
attendance.offlineQueueNotice: Offline changes are safely queued on this device. Reconnect to sync.
attendance.conflictMessage: This player changed elsewhere. Review the latest server value before saving again.
attendance.partialFailure: Some players synced and others still need attention.
attendance.failedToast: Attendance could not be saved. Review the highlighted rows.
attendance.emptyMessage: The session has no current or historical roster entries.
attendance.noMatchesMessage: Clear the search or choose another status filter.
attendance.privacyNotice: Private excuse notes and evidence are never stored in the offline queue or shown in the roster.
attendance.correctionRequired: Enter a reason before saving this correction.
attendance.selfSubtitle: Your participation, check-in, and nothing about anyone else.
attendance.participationFinalizedOnly: Based on finalized sessions only · rule {{version}}
attendance.participationNotConfigured: Attendance scoring is not configured yet. Your record still counts — the summary appears once a rule is approved.
attendance.checkInWindowClosedError: Check-in is closed for this session.
attendance.checkInOfflineNotice: Check-in needs a connection — it cannot be queued offline.
attendance.checkInNoSession: No upcoming session to check in to.
attendance.selfEmptyMessage: Records appear when you check in or a coach finalizes a session.
attendance.selfPrivacyNotice: This page shows only your own attendance.

practice.emptyMessage: Try a different filter or check back later.
practice.offlineNotice: You are offline. Showing the last saved sessions.
practice.boundedNotice: Showing the first {{count}} sessions. Refine the filters to narrow the list.
practice.changeRescheduled: The date or time was rescheduled.
practice.rsvpDeadlinePassed: The RSVP deadline has passed, so responses are closed.
practice.rsvpClosed: RSVP is closed for this session.
practice.rsvpCancelledNotice: This session was cancelled, so RSVP is closed.
practice.rsvpConflict: Your response was updated elsewhere. We refreshed the latest state — please review and respond again.
practice.rsvpErrorToast: We could not save your response. Please try again.
practice.waitlistNotice: You are on the waitlist at position {{position}}.
practice.waitlistNoticeNoPosition: You are on the waitlist for this session.
practice.agendaEmpty: The agenda has not been shared yet.
practice.countsPrivate: Attendance counts are not shared for this session.
practice.subscriptionBody: Subscribe from Settings to sync session times to your calendar. Only the time, type, and venue are shared — private coach notes are never included.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Everyone in your team, with roles, status, and profiles.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, nickname, or jersey
members.errorMessage: Something went wrong while loading the directory. Please try again.
members.offlineMessage: Reconnect to view the member directory.
members.forbiddenMessage: You don't have permission to view this team's directory.
members.emptyMessage: Invite your first member to start building the roster.
members.noMatchesMessage: No members match your search and filters.
members.inviteErrorToast: Couldn't send the invite. Please try again.
members.inviteIntro: Send an account invitation by email, and record the roster profile in the same step.
members.inviteEmailRequired: Enter the email address to invite.
members.inviteRoleHint: The invitee signs in with this role's permissions from day one.
members.inviteProfileIntro: How this person appears in the directory.
members.inviteLinkHint: Share this link only if the email does not arrive. It works once and then expires.
members.inviteLinkCopyFailedToast: Could not copy. Select the link and copy it manually.
members.inviteDuplicateError: That email already has an account or a pending invitation.
members.inviteInvalidError: Check the email address and try again.
members.inviteExpiredError: That invitation is no longer valid. Send a new one.
members.inviteFailedError: The invitation could not be sent. Try again.
members.notFoundMessage: This member isn't in the team, or you don't have access.
members.avatarErrorToast: Couldn't update the photo. Please try again.
members.restrictedNotice: Some fields are hidden based on your access.
members.aliasAddPlaceholder: Another name this member goes by
members.aliasErrorToast: Couldn't update aliases. Please try again.
members.lifecycleNoActions: No lifecycle actions are available for this member.
members.lifecycleConfirmMessage: This changes their membership status and is recorded in the timeline.
members.lifecycleErrorToast: Couldn't update the membership. Please try again.
members.lifecycleConflictToast: This member changed elsewhere. We refreshed their status — please retry.
members.rolesDescription: Roles control what this member can do in the team.
members.rolesCeilingNotice: You can only assign roles at or below your own level.
members.roleErrorToast: Couldn't update roles. Please try again.
members.roleCeilingToast: That role is above your assignment level.
members.roleErrorAccountRequired: This member hasn't joined with an account yet, so roles can't be assigned. Invite them by email first.
members.roleErrorForbidden: You can only assign or remove roles that stay within your own privilege level.
members.roleErrorRoleNotFound: One of the selected roles no longer exists. Refresh and try again.
members.selfEditErrorToast: Couldn't save your profile. Please try again.
members.selfEditConflictToast: Your profile changed elsewhere. We refreshed it — please retry.
members.inviteRolesLoading: Loading the roles you can grant…
members.inviteRolesError: The role list could not be loaded. Close and reopen the form to retry.
members.invitePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to invite members to this team.
members.inviteCeilingExceeded: You cannot grant a role above your own. Choose a role within your ceiling.
members.inviteRoleUnknown: That role no longer exists. Refresh the role list and try again.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: Score the squad, review, and publish when the picture is complete.
assessments.performanceSubtitle: Your published trends, coach feedback, and development goals.
assessments.errorMessage: Something interrupted the request. Try again.
assessments.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest assessments.
assessments.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to view assessments for this team.
assessments.emptyMessage: Once a period opens, drafts for your squad appear here.
assessments.notFoundMessage: This assessment no longer exists, or it was superseded by a revision.
assessments.noMatchesMessage: Clear a filter to widen the list.
assessments.metricNotEvaluatedHint: Not evaluated is not a zero — it records that you had no observation.
assessments.saveConflictToast: Someone else saved first. Reload before editing again.
assessments.saveFailedToast: The draft could not be saved.
assessments.workflowFailedToast: That workflow step did not go through.
assessments.chartTrendDescription: {{metric}} across {{count}} periods, from {{first}} to {{last}}. Gaps mark periods that were not evaluated.
assessments.chartRadarDescription: Latest published profile across {{count}} categories, each scored out of {{max}}.
assessments.chartGapNotice: Periods without an evaluation are left blank, never plotted as zero.
assessments.chartLowData: Only one published period so far — a trend needs at least two.
assessments.feedbackEmptyMessage: Feedback appears here once your coach publishes it.
assessments.goalsEmptyMessage: Goals agreed with your coach appear here with their action plan.
assessments.goalTransitionFailedToast: The goal could not be updated.
assessments.measurementsEmptyHint: Results appear here once your coaches run a measurement session.

training.title: External training
training.subtitle: Log the work you do away from team practice and track every decision.
training.reviewSubtitle: Work the claim queue with the full picture in front of you.
training.errorMessage: Something interrupted the request. Try again.
training.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest training claims.
training.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to work with training claims for this team.
training.emptyMessage: Log your first session and it appears here with its review state.
training.notFoundMessage: This training claim no longer exists, or it was never shared with you.
training.composerIntro: Pick the activity, say when you did it, and add anything a reviewer will need.
training.performedOnHint: Tap to open the calendar. You cannot pick a day in the future.
training.durationHint: Between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes for this activity.
training.candidatePendingHint: This activity has no approved point value yet, so no number is shown until a reviewer decides.
training.candidateNotice: Candidate only. Points are awarded by the server after approval.
training.evidenceIntro: Attach a link, a file reference, or a short note a reviewer can check.
training.evidencePrivacyNotice: Only the reference is stored here. The file itself never leaves the upload service.
training.buddiesIntro: Name who trained with you. Each buddy confirms or declines for themselves.
training.buddyIntro: Teammates named you on their training claims. Confirm only what you actually did together.
training.buddyUnavailable: Buddy confirmations could not be loaded.
training.submitConfirmMessage: A reviewer will see the details, the evidence, and your buddies.
training.withdrawConfirmMessage: It leaves the review queue. You can edit and resubmit afterwards.
training.actionFailedToast: That action did not complete. Try again.
training.historyIntro: Every state this claim has been through, newest first.
training.historyEmpty: Nothing has happened to this claim yet.
training.changesRequestedBanner: A reviewer asked for changes. Update the details, then resubmit.
training.queueEmptyMessage: Nothing is waiting for a decision right now.
training.queueSelectPrompt: Pick a claim from the queue to review it.
training.reviewNotePlaceholder: Explain the decision in a sentence.
training.reviewNoteRequired: A note is required for this decision.
training.reviewSelfBlocked: You cannot review your own claim.
training.signalsIntro: Advisory prompts only. They never decide the outcome — you do.
training.signalDuplicateDay: Another claim already covers this day.
training.signalUnusualVolume: This week is well above this member’s usual volume.
training.signalExtremeBackdating: The date performed is far in the past.
training.signalImplausibleDuration: The duration sits outside the usual range for this activity.
training.signalRepeatedBuddy: The same buddy appears on many recent claims.
training.signalsNone: Nothing stood out on this claim.
training.validationDateFuture: That date is in the future.
training.validationDurationRange: Duration must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.
training.validationEvidenceRequired: This activity needs at least one piece of evidence.
training.validationReferenceRequired: Add the link, file reference, or note text.

points.leaderboardSubtitle: Where the squad stands, and exactly how each rank was reached.
points.historySubtitle: Every award, reversal, and adjustment on your ledger.
points.errorMessage: Something interrupted the request. Try again.
points.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest standings.
points.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to view points for this team.
points.emptyMessage: Once the season records its first points, standings appear here.
points.tieRuleCompetition: Tied members share a rank; the next rank skips ahead by the number of members tied.
points.tieRuleDense: Tied members share a rank; the next rank follows immediately.
points.tieRuleOrdinal: Every member gets a distinct rank, ordered by the server.
points.tieBreakNotice: Ranks come from the server. The rule below is exactly the one it applied.
points.zeroNotice: Members with no points this period stay on the board at 0.
points.explainIntro: These are the contributions the server summed for this member.
points.explainServerNotice: Totals and ranks are computed by the server; the app never recalculates.
points.ledgerIntro: Append-only. A correction is a new entry, never an edit of an old one.
points.appendOnlyNotice: Reversals and adjustments are separate entries; totals are never edited.
points.badgesIntro: Awarded by the server when a published threshold is crossed.
points.badgeCandidateIntro: Candidate thresholds. A badge only exists once the server awards it.
points.chartDescription: Bar chart of the points each activity category contributed.
points.chartEmpty: No category contributions to chart yet.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.subtitle: Leagues, championships, and friendlies this team is entered in.
competitions.errorMessage: The competition list could not be loaded. Try again.
competitions.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load competitions and fixtures.
competitions.forbiddenMessage: You need the competition read grant to open this screen.
competitions.emptyMessage: Once a coach creates a league or championship it appears here.
competitions.notFoundMessage: This competition no longer exists, or it is out of your team scope.
competitions.noMatchesMessage: Clear the status or format filter to see the full list.
competitions.stagesIntro: The structure the organizer published, in playing order.
competitions.stagesEmpty: No stages have been published for this competition yet.
competitions.roundsEmpty: No rounds in this stage yet.
competitions.fixturesIntro: Every fixture is shown in Cairo time.
competitions.fixturesEmpty: No fixtures have been scheduled yet.
competitions.opponentsIntro: Clubs this team has been drawn against.
competitions.opponentsEmpty: No opponents have been registered yet.

squads.title: Season squads
squads.subtitle: Selection, advisory eligibility, availability, and the match-day roster.
squads.errorMessage: The squad could not be loaded. Try again.
squads.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load squads and selections.
squads.forbiddenMessage: You need the squad read grant to open this screen.
squads.emptyMessage: A coach creates a season squad before selection can start.
squads.notFoundMessage: This squad no longer exists, or it is out of your team scope.
squads.noMatchesMessage: Clear the status filter to see the full list.
squads.eligibilityIntro: Signals describe the squad policy. The coach decides.
squads.eligibilityAdvisory: These signals are advisory inputs, never an automatic exclusion. A coach may still select any player, with a recorded reason.
squads.eligibilityEmpty: No candidates are in scope for this squad yet.
squads.overrideNeeded: Selecting this player records a coach override.
squads.overrideIntro: This player is below the squad policy. Selecting them is allowed, and the reason is stored with the selection.
squads.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Why is this selection right for the squad?
squads.overrideReasonRequired: Give a reason of at least 5 characters before overriding.
squads.overrideBlocked: You do not hold the override grant, so this selection is disabled.
squads.availabilityIntro: Tell the coach whether you can play. Only you and the staff see this.
squads.availabilityWindowClosed: The selection deadline has passed; the coach records changes now.
squads.publishIntro: Publishing notifies the squad. Locking freezes selection for match day.
squads.transitionConfirmMessage: Every selected player is notified and the revision is recorded.
squads.actionFailed: That did not go through. Nothing was changed.
squads.lockedNotice: This squad is locked. Open a revision before changing selection.
squads.rosterIntro: Every selected player, including those with no recorded numbers.
squads.rosterPendingNotice: This preview mirrors the current squad selection. Jersey numbers, lines, validation, and lock state live on the roster screens.
squads.rosterEmpty: No player has been selected yet.
squads.rosterExportNote: Abbreviations are expanded and unknown values read “Not enough data”, never zero.

rosters.title: Rosters
rosters.subtitle: Competition and match-day rosters with server-side validation.
rosters.emptyMessage: A coach builds a competition or match roster from a published squad.
rosters.notFoundMessage: This roster no longer exists, or it is out of your team scope.
rosters.noMatchesMessage: Clear the kind filter to see the full list.
rosters.lifecycleIntro: Publishing notifies the roster. Locking freezes it for match day.
rosters.lockedNotice: This roster is locked. Open a revision before changing it.
rosters.actionFailed: That did not go through. Nothing was changed.
rosters.confirmMessage: A snapshot is taken and every rostered player is notified.
rosters.validationIntro: The server checks the roster against its policy. Nothing here is guessed.
rosters.violationJerseyCollision: Two players share a jersey number
rosters.violationMissingJersey: A player has no jersey number
rosters.violationLineBalance: Offense and defense lines are unbalanced
rosters.entriesIntro: Every rostered player, including those with nothing recorded.
rosters.entriesEmpty: Nobody has been added to this roster yet.
rosters.historyEmpty: No snapshot has been taken yet.

tryouts.title: Tryouts
tryouts.subtitle: Registration, check-in, evaluation, decisions, and member conversion.
tryouts.errorMessage: The tryout data could not be loaded. Try again.
tryouts.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load tryout events and candidates.
tryouts.forbiddenMessage: You need the tryout management grant to open this screen.
tryouts.emptyMessage: Create a tryout event to open registration.
tryouts.notFoundMessage: This tryout event no longer exists, or it is out of your team scope.
tryouts.backendPendingNotice: The tryouts service is not deployed yet. These screens run against the local mock contract; switching to the live API is a configuration change.
tryouts.registrationIntro: Register for a tryout. Only the fields below are collected.
tryouts.consentStatement: I agree that Ultimate Natives may store the details above to run this tryout, and I know I can withdraw at any time.
tryouts.consentRequired: Consent is required before you can register.
tryouts.privacyNotice: Contact details and any readiness note are visible only to staff who hold the matching grant. They are never shown in candidate lists or broad exports.
tryouts.validationBirthYearInvalid: Enter a four-digit year of birth.
tryouts.registeredMessage: Keep the reference below. We will email the check-in details.
tryouts.waitlistedMessage: This session is full. We will contact you if a place opens.
tryouts.duplicateMessage: This email is already registered for this tryout.
tryouts.capacityFullNotice: This session is full. New registrations join the waitlist.
tryouts.candidatesIntro: Contact details and readiness notes never appear in this list.
tryouts.selectCandidatePrompt: Pick a candidate to review their tryout.
tryouts.contactsRestrictedMessage: Only staff holding the tryout contacts grant can read these.
tryouts.contactsAuditNotice: Each read of these fields is audited.
tryouts.readinessRestrictedMessage: Only staff holding the tryout readiness grant can read these.
tryouts.readinessExportNotice: Readiness notes are excluded from search and every broad export.
tryouts.evaluationIntro: Score what you observed. Leave a criterion unscored if you did not see it.
tryouts.evaluationForbidden: You need the evaluator grant to score this candidate.
tryouts.decisionIntro: Decisions are visible to the candidate; evaluator notes are not.
tryouts.decisionReasonRequired: A reason of at least 5 characters is required.
tryouts.decisionForbidden: You need the decision grant to decide on this candidate.
tryouts.conversionIntro: Review the preview, then confirm. Converting twice changes nothing.
tryouts.conversionExistingAccount: An account already exists for this candidate; it will be linked.
tryouts.conversionNewAccount: A new membership invitation will be created.
tryouts.conversionConfirmMessage: The candidate becomes a team member and is invited to the app.
tryouts.conversionAlready: This candidate is already a member.
tryouts.conversionBlocked: Only an accepted candidate can be converted.
tryouts.conversionForbidden: You need the conversion grant to convert a candidate.
tryouts.actionFailed: That did not go through. Nothing was changed.

matches.title: Matches
matches.subtitle: Live scoring, match state, and the authoritative event stream.
matches.errorMessage: The match list could not be reached. Try again in a moment.
matches.offlineMessage: Match records load again once the connection returns.
matches.forbiddenTitle: Matches are not shared with you
matches.forbiddenMessage: Ask a coach for match access to open this screen.
matches.emptyMessage: A coach creates the match record from a scheduled fixture.
matches.noMatchesMessage: Clear the status filter to see the full list.

scoreboard.title: Scoreboard
scoreboard.heading: Live scoreboard
scoreboard.subtitle: Score every point on the field. Actions queue offline and replay in order.
scoreboard.errorMessage: The match could not be reached. Try again in a moment.
scoreboard.offlineMessage: Scoring still works: every action queues and replays when you reconnect.
scoreboard.forbiddenTitle: This match is not shared with you
scoreboard.forbiddenMessage: Ask a coach for match access to open the scoreboard.
scoreboard.emptyMessage: This match no longer exists, or it is out of your team scope.
scoreboard.rulesIntro: Caps and allowances come from the published rule set, never from the app.
scoreboard.ruleUnknown: Not set by this rule set
scoreboard.scoringIntro: Each tap carries its own operation id and the score it was taken from, so a repeat never counts twice.
scoreboard.stateIntro: The server owns the state machine; an invalid or stale transition is rejected.
scoreboard.timelineIntro: The append-only event stream, newest first. Nothing here is ever rewritten.
scoreboard.undoMessage: The original event stays in the stream. A compensating correction is appended with your reason.
scoreboard.undoQueuedFirst: Sync the queued actions before correcting an event.
scoreboard.finalizeIntro: A finalized match is immutable; the database refuses any later write.
scoreboard.finalizeBlockedQueue_one: Finalizing is blocked while {{count}} action is still queued.
scoreboard.finalizeBlockedQueue_other: Finalizing is blocked while {{count}} actions are still queued.
scoreboard.finalizeBlockedStatus: Finalizing is available once the match is completed.
scoreboard.finalizeBlockedStale: The scoreboard is behind the server. Refresh before finalizing.
scoreboard.finalizeReady: Everything is synced and the version is current.
scoreboard.scoringClosed: Scoring is closed in this state.
scoreboard.permissionNotice: You can read this scoreboard. Scoring needs the match.score grant.

scorekeeperQueue.panelIntro: Every action is either synced with the server or waiting here in order.
scorekeeperQueue.syncedMessage: No action is waiting. The score on screen is the server score.
scorekeeperQueue.conflictIntro: The server already holds a different result for this action. Two scores are never merged automatically.
scorekeeperQueue.conflictNeverMerged: Nothing was merged. Pick which record stands.
scorekeeperQueue.limitMessage: Scoring is blocked so nothing is dropped. Reconnect to sync, or resolve the conflicts below, then continue.
scorekeeperQueue.limitBlocked: Queue full — reconnect to continue scoring
scorekeeperQueue.otherAccountTitle: Queued actions belong to another account
scorekeeperQueue.otherAccountMessage: Sign back in as the scorekeeper who recorded them to review or send them. They are neither shown nor submitted here.
scorekeeperQueue.queuedToast: Saved offline. It will sync when you reconnect.
scorekeeperQueue.replayedToast: Already recorded — the score did not change.
scorekeeperQueue.conflictToast: Conflict: this action needs your decision.

matchStats.title: Match statistics
matchStats.heading: Match statistics
matchStats.subtitle: Derived per-team and per-player numbers, plus the coaching analysis surfaces.
matchStats.errorMessage: The derived statistics could not be reached. Try again in a moment.
matchStats.offlineMessage: Statistics load again once the connection returns.
matchStats.forbiddenTitle: Statistics are not shared with you
matchStats.forbiddenMessage: Ask a coach for the match.stats.read grant to open this screen.
matchStats.emptyMessage: Nothing has been derived yet because no point has been recorded.
matchStats.teamIntro: Every number here is derived by the server from the append-only event stream.
matchStats.chartCaption: Holds, breaks, and the opponent’s share of the points played
matchStats.chartToggle: Show the numbers as a table
matchStats.playersIntro: Every rostered player appears, including those with no recorded contribution. A measured zero reads 0; a number the stream cannot support reads “not enough data”.
matchStats.playersCaption: Per-player derived statistics for this match
matchStats.reportIntro: Open a player to read their point-by-point report for this match.
matchStats.reportZeroNotice: This player was rostered and recorded no contribution in this match.
matchStats.reportMissingNotice: Some measures are unavailable because the point stream does not carry them.
matchStats.glossaryIntro: The terms this screen uses, in full.
matchStats.glossaryPointsPlayed: Points played — points where the player was on the recorded line.
matchStats.glossaryHold: Hold — a point started on offence and won.
matchStats.glossaryBreak: Break — a point started on defence and won.
matchStats.glossaryBlock: Block — a defensive play that stops the opponent’s throw.
matchStats.glossaryThrowaway: Throwaway — an incomplete throw that gives the disc away.
matchStats.glossaryDrop: Drop — a catchable disc the receiver failed to hold.
matchStats.derivationIntro: The engine, rule set, and completeness of the data behind these numbers.
matchStats.incompleteNotice: Point lineups or plays were not recorded for this match, so per-player measures that depend on them read “not enough data” rather than zero.
matchStats.videoUnavailableTitle: Video analysis is not available yet
matchStats.videoUnavailableMessage: The backend does not yet expose clips, timestamps, or tags. Nothing is mocked here: this surface stays empty until the endpoint ships.
matchStats.videoDeferred: Tracked as a backend gap in docs/api-verification.md.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

teams.switcherAriaLabel: Switch the team you are working in

appBar.label: Page actions
appBar.notificationsEmptyMessage: New practice and roster updates will land here.

admin.title: Admin
admin.heading: Admin console
admin.description: Manage users, roles, and team settings. Only members with the manage-users permission can open this area.

guard.forbiddenMessage: This area needs a permission your account has not been granted.
guard.onboardingMessage: Complete onboarding to continue to this area.
guard.accountBlockedMessage: Your account is not active. Contact an administrator for help.
guard.teamRequiredMessage: This area needs an active team and season. Ask an administrator to add you to a team.

notifications.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
notifications.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Everything the team sent you, newest first. Opening one re-checks your access before it shows anything.
notifications.noMatchesMessage: Change the filters to widen the view.
notifications.boundedNotice: The inbox loads a bounded page at a time and stops at {{max}} items.
notifications.deliveryOtherChannelsNote: Email and push delivery state is not exposed to recipients. Administrators can read failures in the operations centre.
notifications.preferencesSubtitle: Choose which categories reach you on which channel, and when to stay quiet.
notifications.preferencesEmptyMessage: Preferences appear once the first notification category is provisioned.
notifications.channelsIntro: In-app always stays on. Email and push follow the switches below.
notifications.mandatoryNotice: Security and system notices cannot be muted on any channel — this switch is locked, not merely ignored.
notifications.quietHoursIntro: Outside these hours nothing is pushed to your device.
notifications.quietHoursUrgentNote: An urgent practice cancellation still reaches you during quiet hours while this is on.
notifications.teamScopeNote: Preferences apply to the team you are currently acting in: {{team}}.
notifications.linkNoPreviewNotice: Nothing from the target is loaded until the access check passes.
notifications.linkForbiddenTitle: This link is no longer available to you
notifications.linkForbiddenMessage: Your permission for the linked screen was removed. Nothing from it was loaded.
notifications.linkStaleMessage: The notification points at something that no longer exists.
notifications.bodyGeneric: Open this notification to go to the related screen.

adminConsole.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
adminConsole.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
adminConsole.emptyMessage: No admin surface is available for your role.
adminConsole.hubSubtitle: Every configuration, governance, and operations surface you are allowed to reach.
adminConsole.cardSettingsNote: Effective values, versioned changes, seasons, venues, and catalogs.
adminConsole.cardRolesNote: Assign team roles within your own privilege ceiling.
adminConsole.cardRulesNote: Draft, approve, simulate, publish, and retire rule versions.
adminConsole.cardOperationsNote: Outbox health, dead letters, job health, and the audit log.
adminConsole.cardPlatformNote: Promote or revoke platform super administrators. Every change is audited.

adminSettings.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
adminSettings.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
adminSettings.title: Team settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Effective configuration, its version history, and the reference data the rest of the app reads.
adminSettings.emptyMessage: This team has no configuration recorded.
adminSettings.effectiveIntro: What the application reads today, with the moment each value took effect.
adminSettings.versionsIntro: Every effective-dated change for the selected setting, newest first.
adminSettings.addVersionIntro: A new version never edits history: it takes effect at the moment you choose.
adminSettings.addVersionInvalidReason: Give a reason of at least 5 characters.
adminSettings.seasonsIntro: The season windows every scoped screen filters by.
adminSettings.venuesIntro: Where sessions and fixtures are held.
adminSettings.catalogIntro: Divisions, formats, and positions the rest of the app selects from.
adminSettings.readOnlyNotice: You may read this configuration but not change it.

adminRoles.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
adminRoles.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
adminRoles.title: Roles and access
adminRoles.subtitle: Assign team roles. You can only grant what you already hold — the server enforces the same ceiling.
adminRoles.emptyMessage: Invite a member before assigning roles.
adminRoles.noMatchesMessage: Change the filter to widen the view.
adminRoles.selectPrompt: Select a member to review their roles.
adminRoles.ceilingNotice: Only roles inside your own privilege ceiling are listed. Anything above it is not shown and would be rejected.
adminRoles.noAssignable: You hold no role you can pass on here.
adminRoles.reasonRequired: Give a reason of at least 5 characters.

adminRules.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
adminRules.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
adminRules.title: Points and calculation rules
adminRules.subtitle: Versioned policy: a draft is approved, simulated, published, and only then read by scoring.
adminRules.emptyMessage: Nothing has been drafted for this team.
adminRules.noMatchesMessage: Change the filters to widen the view.
adminRules.entriesIntro: What each activity category is worth.
adminRules.componentsIntro: The weighted inputs this rule combines.
adminRules.lifecycleIntro: Draft → approved → published → retired. Each step is re-authorized by the server.
adminRules.publishBlockedNotice: Run a simulation before publishing: activation without a dry run is refused here and by the server.
adminRules.simulateIntro: A dry run writes nothing. It compares the draft against what is published today.
adminRules.simulateNoBaseline: No published rule to compare against
adminRules.readOnlyNotice: You may read these rule versions but not change them.
adminRules.selectPrompt: Select a rule to review its versions.

adminOperations.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
adminOperations.forbiddenMessage: Your role does not include this screen. Ask an administrator if you need it.
adminOperations.title: Operations centre
adminOperations.subtitle: Delivery health, failed work, and who changed what. Payload bodies are never shown.
adminOperations.outboxIntro: How much work is queued, running, done, and dead.
adminOperations.deadLetterIntro: Events that exhausted their retries. Replay re-queues the event by id — the client never sees the payload.
adminOperations.deadLetterNoPayloadNotice: Payload bodies stay on the server. Only the event id, type, and failure count travel to this screen.
adminOperations.jobHealthIntro: Scheduled work and when it last completed.
adminOperations.auditIntro: Who did what, and whether it was allowed.
adminOperations.auditDiffNotice: Change bodies are summarised as a field count; values are not rendered here.
adminOperations.deadLetterEmpty: No dead-lettered events — every delivery has been processed.

teamsAdmin.title: Teams
teamsAdmin.subtitle: Every team on this deployment, with its branding and lifecycle.
teamsAdmin.emptyMessage: Create the first team to start inviting members and scheduling practices.
teamsAdmin.errorMessage: The team list did not load. Try again.
teamsAdmin.forbiddenMessage: Browsing teams needs a permission your account has not been granted.
teamsAdmin.listIntro: Slug, timezone, and lifecycle state for each team.
teamsAdmin.createIntro: The slug is permanent — it identifies the team in every link.
teamsAdmin.editIntro: Rename or re-brand. The slug cannot change once the team exists.
teamsAdmin.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Cannot be changed later.
teamsAdmin.archiveConfirmMessage: Its members, practices, and history stay intact, but the team leaves active use.
teamsAdmin.archiveIrreversibleNotice: Archiving is not reversible from this app: the backend exposes no un-archive endpoint yet.
teamsAdmin.failedToast: That did not work. Try again.
teamsAdmin.readOnlyNotice: You can browse teams here. Creating and editing needs the manage permission.
teamsAdmin.transitionInvalidError: That change is not allowed from the team’s current state.
teamsAdmin.createForbiddenNotice: Creating and browsing every team is a platform-administrator capability. Your account manages its own teams.

seasonsAdmin.title: Seasons
seasonsAdmin.subtitle: The competitive windows squads, competitions, and rosters are built inside.
seasonsAdmin.emptyMessage: Create a season before building squads, competitions, or rosters.
seasonsAdmin.errorMessage: The season list did not load. Try again.
seasonsAdmin.forbiddenMessage: Managing seasons needs a permission your account has not been granted.
seasonsAdmin.listIntro: Each season’s window and where it sits in its lifecycle.
seasonsAdmin.createIntro: A draft season is invisible to players until you make it active.
seasonsAdmin.editIntro: Adjust the window or move the season through its lifecycle.
seasonsAdmin.slugHint: Short and stable, for example 2026 or 2026-spring.
seasonsAdmin.statusHint: Draft while you prepare it, active while it runs, archived when it is over.
seasonsAdmin.archiveConfirmMessage: Its squads, competitions, and results stay readable.
seasonsAdmin.datesRequired: Choose both a start and an end date.
seasonsAdmin.datesOutOfOrder: The end date has to fall after the start date.
seasonsAdmin.failedToast: That did not work. Try again.
seasonsAdmin.readOnlyNotice: You can read seasons here. Creating and editing needs the manage permission.
seasonsAdmin.alreadyActiveError: This team already has an active season. Close it before activating another.
seasonsAdmin.invalidTransitionError: That change is not allowed from the season’s current state.
seasonsAdmin.noCurrentSeason: No season is active right now.

permissionsMatrix.title: Permissions matrix
permissionsMatrix.subtitle: Exactly what each role bundle grants, straight from the seeded catalog.
permissionsMatrix.emptyMessage: The permission catalog came back empty.
permissionsMatrix.errorTitle: The matrix could not be loaded
permissionsMatrix.errorMessage: The role catalog did not load. Try again.
permissionsMatrix.forbiddenMessage: Reading the role catalog needs a permission your account has not been granted.
permissionsMatrix.readOnlyNotice: Read-only. Role bundles are seeded by the backend; assign roles from a member’s profile.

adminPlatform.errorMessage: The super administrator roster could not be loaded.
adminPlatform.forbiddenMessage: Only a platform super administrator can view or change this roster.
adminPlatform.title: Platform administrators
adminPlatform.subtitle: Grant and revoke the platform-wide top privilege — separately from team invitations, with an audited reason for every change.
adminPlatform.emptyMessage: The roster is empty; promote a user below.
adminPlatform.rosterIntro: Everyone holding the platform-wide super administrator role, with when and by whom it was granted.
adminPlatform.auditNotice: Every promotion and revocation is recorded with actor, target, and reason.
adminPlatform.revokeConfirmMessage: {{email}} will immediately lose all platform-wide privileges.
adminPlatform.promoteIntro: Super administrators are never created through a team invitation. Promotion happens only here, and only by an existing super administrator.
adminPlatform.reasonPlaceholder: Why this person needs platform-wide access
adminPlatform.reasonRequired: State a reason of at least 8 characters — it is written to the audit log.
adminPlatform.promoteConfirmMessage: User {{userId}} will gain every permission on the platform.
adminPlatform.lastAdminError: You cannot remove the last super administrator — promote a replacement first.
adminPlatform.forbiddenError: You do not have permission to change platform administrators.
adminPlatform.notFoundError: That user holds no super administrator assignment.
adminPlatform.targetConflictError: That user cannot be promoted — the account is missing or not active.
adminPlatform.validationError: Check the user ID and reason, then try again.
adminPlatform.genericError: The change could not be completed.

settingForm.effectiveFromDialog: Choose when the change takes effect
settingForm.pastError: Pick a moment in the future.
settingForm.staleToast: Someone else changed this setting first. The history has been refreshed — review it and confirm again.
settingForm.conflictToast: A version already exists at that exact moment. Pick another instant.
settingForm.rawIntro: Platform administrators only. The document is validated against the same contract before it can be applied.
settingForm.rawInvalid: This document does not match the setting contract.

settingEditors.weightsBlocked: Configure attendance statuses first — weights attach to the statuses effective at this moment.
settingEditors.weightsLoading: Resolving the statuses effective at the chosen moment…
settingEditors.squadFloorHint: At least 7 — a squad below a full line cannot play.
settingEditors.quietOvernight: A window like 22:00 → 07:00 wraps past midnight — that is intended.

settingHistory.cancelConfirmMessage: The change planned for {{when}} will never take effect.
settingHistory.cancelNotCancellable: This version is already in effect — history is never rewritten.
settingHistory.legacyNotice: Stored before validation existed — never applied.
settingHistory.legacyPrepared: The editor now starts from a blank valid configuration.
settingHistory.diffNotComparable: Not comparable with the previous document.
settingHistory.empty: No versions recorded for this setting.

settingSummary.legacyValue: Legacy value — replace it with a valid configuration

settingConstraints.missingPole: Include active On time and Absent statuses.
settingConstraints.noMetricStatus: At least one active status must count toward metrics.
settingConstraints.noActiveEntry: Keep at least one active entry.
settingConstraints.outOfRange: A value is out of its allowed range.
settingConstraints.tooManyDecimals: Weights allow at most 3 decimal places.
settingConstraints.stepNotDivisor: The range must divide evenly by the step.
settingConstraints.bandOutsideScale: A band lies outside the scale or is inverted.
settingConstraints.thresholdNotAscending: Thresholds must rise from tier to tier.
settingConstraints.squadExceedsRoster: The match squad cannot exceed the roster.
settingConstraints.squadBelowLine: A match squad needs at least 7 players.
settingConstraints.positionCapBelowSquadMin: Position caps cannot cover the squad minimum.
settingConstraints.noChannel: An enabled rule needs at least one channel.
settingConstraints.leadHoursRequired: Practice reminders need a lead time.
settingConstraints.leadHoursForbidden: Only practice reminders carry a lead time.
settingConstraints.quietHoursEqual: Quiet hours must not start and end at the same time.
settingConstraints.invalidValue: This value does not match the setting contract.
